sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Class Action Lawsuit Filed Against PayPal Holdings, Inc.
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm has filed a class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased stock between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal provided overly optimistic financial targets while concealing inadequacies in its salesforce, which misled investors and caused financial losses. The law firm operates on a contingency fee basis, inviting affected investors to apply as lead plaintiffs by April 20, 2026.

feed.title: Jack In The Box (JACK) Q1 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
feed.summary: Jack In The Box (JACK) reported Q1 2026 revenue of $349.52 million, a 25.6% year-over-year decrease and EPS of $1.00, down from $1.92 a year ago. While revenue beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 1.64%, EPS missed by 8.81%. The article also details various key metrics, including restaurant counts and same-store sales, comparing them against analyst estimates.

feed.title: AGNC Investment Stock Is Interesting, but Here's What I'd Buy Instead
feed.summary: This article contrasts AGNC Investment (AGNC) with Realty Income (O) for investors seeking reliable dividends. While AGNC offers a high yield, its dividend history is volatile and declining, making it less suitable for income-focused investors. Realty Income, despite a lower yield, provides a much more stable and growing dividend, making it a better choice for consistent passive income.

feed.title: BigBear.ai (NYSE:BBAI) Shares Up 2.6% - Still a Buy?
feed.summary: BigBear.ai (NYSE:BBAI) shares increased by 2.6% to $4.1950 on Thursday, with trading volume about half its average. Analyst sentiment is mixed, with downgrades from Wall Street Zen and Cantor Fitzgerald, but a buy rating from HC Wainwright. The company shows strong liquidity with quick and current ratios of 3.13 and low leverage (debt/equity 0.18), though it has a negative P/E ratio of -2.95.

feed.title: Seagate Tech Executes Private Exchange to Retire Debt
feed.summary: Seagate Technology (STX) recently completed private exchanges of $600 million in 3.50% Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2028, using cash and approximately 5.95 million ordinary shares. This transaction retired a significant portion of its debt, leaving $400 million outstanding, and strategically adjusted its capital structure. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates STX as Outperform due to improving fundamentals and a positive earnings outlook, despite some balance sheet risks and a relatively high valuation.

feed.title: Constellation Selected as Preferred Energy Source of New Nissan Stadium and the Tennessee Titans
feed.summary: Constellation has been chosen as the Preferred Energy Source for the new Nissan Stadium and the Tennessee Titans through a 20-year agreement. Starting in 2027, Constellation will operate an on-site energy plant, providing heating and cooling for the stadium, designed for high reliability, energy efficiency, and fan comfort. This partnership emphasizes the Titans' commitment to sustainability and builds on Constellation's existing presence in Nashville through its operation of the Metro Nashville's District Energy System.

feed.title: Constellation Completes Calpine Transaction, Powering America's Clean Energy Future
feed.summary: Constellation (Nasdaq: CEG) has announced the completion of its acquisition of Calpine Corporation from Energy Capital Partners, forming the nation's largest electricity producer. This combination of Constellation's nuclear fleet with Calpine's natural gas and geothermal generation aims to provide reliable, clean energy, supporting America's clean energy future and economic leadership. The expanded company will serve 2.5 million customers and operate 55 gigawatts of capacity, driving innovation in new clean technologies.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage forecasts annual FFO below estimates on tepid demand
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage (EXR) has forecast its annual Funds From Operations (FFO) to be below market estimates. This projection is attributed to a tepid demand for its storage services. The news was reported by Refinitiv and Reuters.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp Stock After Earnings: Undervalued Bank or Value Trap?
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp (USB) recently released earnings, showing it is navigating deposit pricing pressure and cooling rate-cut hopes. The company's net interest income has plateaued, but fee-based businesses are providing a buffer, and credit quality, while normalizing, remains manageable. Despite potential regulatory capital increases, USB's dividend appears secure, positioning it as a quality, income-oriented regional bank with moderate upside for long-term investors.

feed.title: Martin Marietta Materials Keeps Quarterly Dividend of $0.83 per Share, Payable March 31 to Holders of Record March 2
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend of $0.83 per share. This dividend is payable on March 31, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 2, 2026. The company, a major producer of construction materials, also released information regarding recent analyst price target adjustments and an executive appointment.

feed.title: Five9 Q4 2025 Earnings: Revenue and Profit Top Analyst Expectations - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Five9 (FIVN) reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025, surpassing analyst expectations for both revenue and profit. The cloud contact center software provider achieved $300.3 million in revenue, a 7.8% year-over-year increase, and adjusted earnings per share of $0.80. While the company's five-year sales growth rate is robust, recent quarters indicate a deceleration, with future revenue growth projected to slow further.

feed.title: Alliant Energy Announces 2025 Results
feed.summary: Alliant Energy (NASDAQ: LNT) announced strong financial results for 2025, with GAAP EPS of $3.14 and ongoing EPS of $3.22, representing 6% growth from 2024. The company affirmed its 2026 ongoing EPS guidance of $3.36 - $3.46, continuing a decade-long track record of over 6% compound annual earnings growth. Alliant Energy also outlined significant capital expenditure projections for 2026 through 2029, focusing on renewables, energy storage, and system improvements.

feed.title: L3Harris THAAD Contract Adds Context To Valuation And Momentum Story
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies secured a nearly $400 million contract for the THAAD missile defense system, reinforcing its role as a key supplier in the defense sector. The contract highlights demand for L3Harris's propulsion and control systems, which could influence future revenue visibility and investors' assessment of the company's long-term positioning. While the stock trades near its estimated fair value and has strong recent momentum, investors should consider the company's debt levels and how new contracts translate to cash generation.

feed.title: Vistra Increases Quarterly Dividend to $0.2280 per Share From $0.2270; Payable March 31 to Holders of Record on March 20
feed.summary: Vistra Corp. has announced an increase in its quarterly dividend from $0.2270 to $0.2280 per share. This dividend will be payable on March 31, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 20, 2026. The company, an integrated retail and electric power generation firm, operates across six business segments including Retail, Texas, and East.

feed.title: History
feed.summary: Constellation Energy's "History" page details the company's evolution into a leader in clean, reliable energy. It highlights their growth from power generation beginnings to becoming the nation's largest producer of emissions-free power. The page invites visitors to explore key milestones that have shaped their journey in driving America's clean energy future.

feed.title: Natural Gas Generation
feed.summary: Constellation Energy utilizes natural gas to meet increasing energy demands, emphasizing its role in providing dependable, lower-emission energy and supporting grid stability. The company's natural gas facilities employ innovative technologies like combined-cycle gas and steam turbines to maximize efficiency and reduce environmental impact. Constellation also highlights its commitment to community involvement, employee safety, and reliable operations through these advanced generation methods.

feed.title: Our Work
feed.summary: Constellation Energy showcases its diverse operational areas, highlighting its generation fleet which includes nuclear, natural gas, geothermal, hydro, wind, and solar facilities. The company also emphasizes its commercial solutions for customers, its innovation in advanced technologies, and its commitment to shaping public policies that support clean energy and grid reliability. This overview demonstrates Constellation's dedication to providing reliable and clean energy across the U.S.

feed.title: About Us
feed.summary: Constellation is focused on building clean, reliable energy capacity for the future while meeting current energy demands, emphasizing their role in securing America's energy future. The company highlights its business overview, purpose, leadership team, key locations, and achievements in delivering clean and reliable power. Constellation aims to light the way to a brilliant tomorrow through shared values and a commitment to its customers, communities, and the nation.

feed.title: Supporting Corporate and Sustainability Governance
feed.summary: Constellation's governance strategy is guided by its Board of Directors and executive team, ensuring operational and business initiatives are supported. The company emphasizes strong governance and risk management to identify and address market opportunities and risks, driving financial success and responsible growth. The Board oversees crucial areas including business operations, enterprise risks, executive compensation, corporate citizenship, and sustainability.

feed.title: Commercial Energy Solutions for Businesses | Constellation
feed.summary: Constellation offers a wide range of commercial energy solutions, including wholesale energy, retail products for businesses of all sizes, and channel partner programs. They leverage a diverse portfolio, including the nation's largest emissions-free energy fleet, to provide reliable and customized energy strategies, focusing on price stability, efficiency, and sustainability. The company also highlights its strong market position, industry recognitions, and commitment to innovation in competitive energy markets.

feed.title: Our Impact
feed.summary: Constellation Energy is committed to operating its businesses in a socially responsible and sustainable manner, focusing on clean energy and climate action. While a re-evaluation of climate goals is underway due to a transaction with Calpine, the company's core commitment to sustainability and providing clean, reliable energy remains unchanged. Key areas of impact include managing climate impacts, fostering diversity and inclusion within its workforce, supporting communities, maintaining strong corporate governance, and promoting sustainability through sports sponsorships.

feed.title: Is It Too Late to Buy Amcor After Its Recent Rally?
feed.summary: Amcor (NYSE: AMCR), a global packaging leader, is gaining momentum after its Berry merger. Despite its recent rally, the company offers a 5.3% dividend yield, rising profits, and strong synergy guidance, suggesting potential for both steady income and growth. This analysis, originally from The Motley Fool, positions Amcor as a potentially overlooked defensive compounder for long-term investors.

feed.title: Kroger revives plan to build a Marketplace grocery store near Keller Town Center
feed.summary: Kroger is revisiting a decade-old plan to construct a 100,000-square-foot Marketplace grocery store with a gas station near Keller Town Center. If approved, the new store would replace the existing 34-year-old Kroger in the area. The company is seeking a special-use permit and has invited residents to a town hall meeting in March to discuss the project and address concerns.

feed.title: Targa Resources Corp. Announces Form 10-K Available
feed.summary: Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) has filed its Form 10-K with the SEC for the year ended December 31, 2025. The report is accessible via the SEC's website and the Investors section of Targa's website. Hard copies can also be requested free of charge from the company's investor relations department.

feed.title: Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN) Moves Higher As Russell 1000 Confidence Strengthens Today
feed.summary: Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN), a global asset and wealth manager providing public and private market capabilities, saw its stock move higher as confidence in the Russell 1000 index strengthened. The company recently reported broad-based net inflows and record assets under management. Franklin Resources is also exploring a tokenized collateral program, utilizing digital representations for collateral processes.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Wall Paint: What US DIYers Are Getting Right (and Wrong)
feed.summary: This article analyzes Sherwin-Williams wall paint's popularity among US DIYers, comparing its performance against cheaper brands. It details various Sherwin-Williams paint lines, their benefits, and typical price ranges, while highlighting common mistakes DIYers make, such as inadequate surface preparation. The piece concludes that Sherwin-Williams paint is often worth the investment if the right product is chosen and purchased during sales, combined with proper application techniques.

feed.title: CF Industries anticipates 9.5M tons ammonia output in 2026 as Yazoo City recovery extends
feed.summary: CF Industries expects to produce 9.5 million tons of ammonia in 2026. This forecast comes as the recovery efforts at its Yazoo City facility are anticipated to extend through the first half of 2025. The company is managing the return of the facility to full operation, which impacts its production outlook over the next couple of years.

feed.title: Copart Q4 2025 Results: Revenue & Earnings Below Analyst Estimates - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Copart (NASDAQ:CPRT) reported fourth-quarter 2025 results that missed analyst expectations, with revenue declining 3.6% year-over-year to $1.12 billion and GAAP earnings per share of $0.36. Despite this short-term dip, the company has shown strong long-term growth, achieving a 15.1% compounded annual growth rate over the past five years. Analysts project revenue to grow by 6% over the next 12 months, indicating confidence in new products and services.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Equifax (EFX) After Its Recent Share Price Pullback?
feed.summary: Equifax (EFX) has experienced mixed share price returns recently, with declines over the past month and year but gains over the last seven days. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 56.2%, estimating an intrinsic value of $445.94 compared to its current price of US$195.30. However, its Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio of 35.61x is higher than the industry average, indicating it may appear overvalued based on earnings comparisons.

feed.title: First Solar Says On Feb 13, Entered Revolving Credit Agreement With JPMorgan Chase
feed.summary: First Solar (FSLR) announced that on February 13, it entered into a revolving credit agreement with JPMorgan Chase. This news was reported by Reuters and indicates a financial arrangement for the solar energy company.

feed.title: A diagnostics company moved out. Its former landlord claims it left a mess.
feed.summary: A diagnostics company has been sued by its former landlord in South San Francisco, who alleges that the company left the premises in disarray after moving out. The article states that the former home of Myriad Genetics at 468 Littlefield Ave. in South San Francisco is now vacant. Further details about the specific allegations are not provided in this preview.

feed.title: Licensing Deals Propel InterDigital, Inc. (IDCC) to Record Revenues
feed.summary: InterDigital, Inc. (IDCC) achieved near-record total revenues and record smartphone licensing revenues, reaching $834 million and $678.9 million respectively, driven by successful licensing deals including with Samsung, Vivo, and Honor. The company also reported record net income and adjusted EBITDA. InterDigital, a global R&D firm, focuses on patenting and licensing foundational wireless communication and video processing technologies, recently filing patent infringement lawsuits against Hisense and TCL.

feed.title: AngloGold Ashanti Plc (NYSE:AU) Versus Peers What Comparisons Matter Most
feed.summary: This article examines AngloGold Ashanti Plc (NYSE:AU) within the metals and mining sector, focusing on gold mining. It highlights that business performance in this sector is significantly influenced by ore grades. The content hints at discussing key comparisons and valuation approaches relevant to the company, but requires login to read the full analysis.

feed.title: F&G Annuities & Life (NYSE:FG) Issues Earnings Results
feed.summary: F&G Annuities & Life (NYSE:FG) reported Q4 earnings of $0.91 EPS, significantly missing analyst estimates of $1.40, with revenue of $739 million also falling short of the $1.55 billion expectation. Following the earnings release, the company's shares dropped to $27.74, trading near its 52-week low. Despite the miss, insiders recently made purchases, with CEO Christopher Blunt buying 5,000 shares, and institutional investors hold a significant portion of the stock.

feed.title: Regency Centers Debt Deal And Shelf Filing Reframe Growth And Risk
feed.summary: Regency Centers priced a $450 million public offering of senior unsecured notes and filed a new shelf registration statement, enabling future securities issuance for refinancing and growth projects. These financial moves aim to enhance flexibility, manage debt, and fund new developments in its grocery-anchored portfolio. While analysts flag potential risks regarding debt coverage, the company's strong earnings growth and dividend signal a capacity to manage higher interest expenses and support continuous shareholder payouts.

feed.title: Marsh & McLennan Issues $600 Million Senior Notes
feed.summary: Marsh & McLennan Companies has issued $600 million of 4.950% senior notes due in 2036. The issuance, underwritten by a syndicate including Citigroup Global Markets and J.P. Morgan Securities, strengthens the firm's long-term funding. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates MRSH as Neutral, citing solid operating performance balanced by balance-sheet leverage risk and bearish technicals.

feed.title: Farmer Mac: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Federal Agricultural Mortgage Corp. (Farmer Mac) announced its fourth-quarter net income of $47.9 million, or $3.71 per share, with adjusted earnings of $3.66 per share. The company reported quarterly revenue of $107.9 million. For the full year, Farmer Mac recorded a profit of $207.4 million, or $16.62 per share, on revenue of $410.3 million.

feed.title: Five9's (NASDAQ:FIVN) Q4 CY2025 Sales Beat Estimates, Guides For 9.1% Growth Next Year
feed.summary: Five9 (NASDAQ:FIVN) reported stronger-than-expected revenue in Q4 CY2025, with sales increasing 7.8% year-on-year to $300.3 million, beating analyst estimates. The company also surpassed non-GAAP profit and adjusted operating income expectations. While current growth has slowed compared to its five-year average, Five9 provided guidance for 9.1% growth next year and its stock traded up 2.7% immediately after the report.

feed.title: Seattle Reign land new sponsor ahead of 2026 season
feed.summary: The Seattle Reign FC has secured CVS Health as a new sponsor, with the healthcare company's branding set to appear on the team's pitch and as the first right-sleeve sponsor on their jerseys. This deal marks a significant partnership for the Reign ahead of their 2026 season.

feed.title: Copart shares tumble as quarterly results miss expectations
feed.summary: Copart Inc. (NASDAQ:CPRT) shares fell 11.1% in after-hours trading after the company reported second-quarter fiscal results that missed Wall Street expectations. The online vehicle auction leader posted earnings per share of $0.36, below the analyst consensus of $0.39, and revenue of $1.12 billion, which also lagged behind the expected $1.15 billion. This marks a decline in both earnings and revenue compared to the previous year, with gross profit also contracting.

feed.title: Omnicom Ignites Wall Street with $5 Billion Buyback and Aggressive Post-Merger Synergy Targets
feed.summary: Omnicom Group Inc. announced a significant $5 billion share repurchase program and aggressive post-merger synergy targets following its acquisition of Interpublic Group of Companies. This move, aimed at rewarding investors and accelerating earnings per share, comes after its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results, which included a GAAP net loss but strong adjusted performance. The aggressive buyback and increased synergy targets have driven Omnicom's shares up, putting pressure on competitors and signaling a shift towards industrialization and capital distribution in the advertising sector.

feed.title: Coterra (CTRA) and Devon pick McKinsey, name integration leaders aiming Q2 close
feed.summary: Coterra Energy Inc. (CTRA) has announced the commencement of its merger integration planning with Devon, appointing an integration steering team, co-led by Blake Sirgo and Trey Lowe, and selecting McKinsey & Co. as the integration consultant. The companies aim to close the merger in the second quarter of 2026, pending regulatory and shareholder approvals, and will continue to operate independently until then. This move signifies a formal step towards combining operations, with early focus on organizational design, talent, culture, and communication.

feed.title: Five9: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Five9 Inc. (FIVN) reported strong fourth-quarter results, with profit reaching $19.7 million and adjusted earnings of 80 cents per share, surpassing Wall Street's expectations. The company also exceeded revenue forecasts, posting $300.3 million. Five9 provided optimistic financial guidance for the upcoming quarter and the full year, projecting continued growth in earnings and revenue.

feed.title: CNH in Top 1% of S&P Global’s 2026 Sustainability Yearbook
feed.summary: CNH has been recognized in the top 1% of companies in S&P Global’s 2026 Sustainability Yearbook, achieving a score of 83/100 in the 2025 Corporate Sustainability Assessment. This accomplishment follows CNH's inclusion in the Dow Jones Sustainability World and North America Indices and its recognition with an A Climate score and A- Water score from CDP, highlighting the company's strong commitment to sustainability across its operations.

feed.title: International logistics company announces closure of Memphis distribution center
feed.summary: GXO Logistics will close its distribution center in Memphis, Tennessee, resulting in 185 layoffs. The closure is expected to occur between April 3 and May 31, 2026. This follows other business closures in the Mid-South, including IKEA and Nike.

feed.title: Federal Agricultural Mortgage (NYSE:AGM) Posts Earnings Results, Misses Expectations By $0.84 EPS
feed.summary: Federal Agricultural Mortgage (NYSE:AGM) announced its quarterly earnings, reporting an EPS of $3.66, missing analyst expectations of $4.50 by $0.84. Revenue also fell short at $101.39 million against an anticipated $107.45 million. Following the announcement, the stock dipped, trading at $174.59 with a market capitalization of $1.9 billion, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $219.00.

feed.title: Farmer Mac Posts Record 2025 Results, Raises Dividend
feed.summary: Farmer Mac (Federal Agricultural) reported record financial results for fiscal year 2025, including a 7% increase in core earnings per share and strong capital ratios. The company's board demonstrated confidence by raising the common dividend by 7% for the fifteenth consecutive year and maintaining preferred stock dividends. Despite some credit events, an AI analyst from TipRanks has rated AGM as "Outperform."

feed.title: Galway Metals Announces Filing of NI 43-101 Technical Report for Previously Announced Estrades Preliminary Economic Assessment
feed.summary: Galway Metals Inc. announced the filing of a National Instrument 43-101 (NI 43-101) technical report for its Estrades Project, located in Quebec. This Preliminary Economic Assessment (PEA) report confirms previous robust results announced on January 21, 2026. The report, prepared by BBA E&C Inc. and SLR Consulting (Canada) Ltd., highlights the company's progress on its 100% owned gold-rich polymetallic VMS mine.

feed.title: J&J Pauses Enrollment In Trial Of AC Immune-Partnered Anti-Tau Immunotherapy
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson has paused enrollment in a trial for an anti-tau immunotherapy, developed in partnership with AC Immune. While new patient recruitment is halted, existing participants will continue to receive dosing. This decision comes after J&J's anti-tau asset, Posdinemab, previously failed in a Phase II Alzheimer's study.

feed.title: California AG Bonta Appeals Ruling in Exxon Defamation Suit (1)
feed.summary: California Attorney General Rob Bonta is appealing a federal judge's ruling that denied him immunity in a defamation lawsuit filed by Exxon Mobil Corp. The lawsuit stems from statements Bonta made about Exxon's plastics recycling efforts, specifically an alleged email to Texas residents where he accused the company of lying. The judge ruled that Bonta, as a public official, is not immune from the suit regarding the campaign-related email.
